description: Fine-tune SOTA open legal NLP models and general-purpose models on NZ legislative and Hansard corpora. Covers Legal-BERT, SaulLM, Gemma, Phi-4, Qwen, Mistral, Exaone, MiniCPM5, Liquid, Kimi.
oracle_notes: Repo-side Phase 1 implementation and closeout evidence are complete: training data preparation, task examples, MLM collator, metrics, Legal-BERT/QLoRA job specs, dry-run CLI evidence, fine-tuning scripts, dependency declarations, and focused tests. Track 20 remains in_progress because CUDA/GPU validation, dataset-scale model training, held-out evaluation improvements, and Hugging Face publication are external gates. Current evidence does not claim completed CUDA training, held-out improvements, or Hub publishing.
